stimulus: A member of the Onondaga Nation, Lyons Skenandoah is celebrated for his contributions to NASA’s Earth Observing Mission, which ______blank detailed satellite imagery of remote ecosystems.
stem: Which choice completes the text so that it conforms to the conventions of Standard English?
rationale:
Choice D is correct. The relative clause introduced by “which” requires a finite verb. The past tense verb “delivered” correctly serves as the main verb of the clause and matches the past time frame.

Choices A, B, and C are nonfinite forms (to-infinitive, present participle, perfect participle) that cannot serve as the main verb of a clause.
